block_00: Find the breakout, ride the trend
block_01: The breakout approach is aimed at finding price levels that an asset hasn’t reached yet. While the price moves in its corridor, traders define the support and resistance levels. Once the price goes beyond one of those levels, a breakout is detected. This may be a possibility of a profitable “Buy” or “Sell” deal, if a trader finds the right moment for an entry.
block_02: While it doesn’t sound too complicated, it is not always easy to spot the breakout moment. In this article, we have thoroughly explained how this method works and which tools traders can use in order to confirm a breakout.
block_03: This strategy might be your big breakthrough on the way to better trading results. Pun intended! Read the full article to master this method.
